source_candidate_matrix.notes: MLB StatsAPI (statsapi.mlb.com/api/v1/schedule) provides official schedule + game status. No key required. Terms: unofficial/public use allowed but ToS should be reviewed for commercial use. Rate limit: approximately 5–10 req/sec observed. Pitcher data available via /api/v1/game/{gamePk}/boxscore.
Python wrapper around MLB StatsAPI. Simplifies schedule/roster/pitcher queries. Dependency risk: library maintenance status unknown as of 2026.

source_candidate_matrix.rejection_reason: Manual process; not suitable for automated daily pipeline without human operator
source_candidate_matrix.notes: Fallback option when API unavailable. Requires human to prepare CSV per contract schema.

source_candidate_matrix.rejection_reason: FIXTURE_NOT_PRODUCTION: fixture is for tests / local dry-run / schema validation / demo only. Must never be used as production advisory source.

source_candidate_matrix.notes: Commercial API providing aggregated bookmaker odds (ML/RL/Total). Supports multiple bookmakers (DraftKings, FanDuel, BetMGM, etc.). Free tier: 500 requests/month. Paid: ~500-2500 req/month per plan. Suitable for pre-game odds. API key required. Terms: commercial use OK with subscription. REQUIRES_VERIFICATION: pricing, rate limits, available markets.

source_candidate_matrix.rejection_reason: High cost — enterprise pricing. Not appropriate for research/quant phase. Revisit if production deployment is approved.
source_candidate_matrix.notes: Sportradar is a leading sports data provider. Enterprise pricing typically $thousands/month. Full ML/RL/Total coverage, high reliability. Not cost-appropriate for current research phase.

source_candidate_matrix.rejection_reason: GOVERNANCE_RISK: Web scraping violates Action Network ToS. High fragility (HTML structure changes). Not a viable production solution. Listed for awareness only — must not be used.
source_candidate_matrix.notes: ⚠️ SCRAPING RISK: Terms of Service likely prohibit scraping. HTML structure changes frequently. Marked as BLOCKED — must not be used in production pipeline.

source_candidate_matrix.rejection_reason: Manual process; not suitable for automated pipeline
source_candidate_matrix.notes: Fallback option. Human operator records opening-line or closing-line odds to CSV per contract schema. Acceptable for occasional use; not for continuous daily automation.

source_candidate_matrix.source_name: Fixture Odds Source (embedded in fixture file)
source_candidate_matrix.rejection_reason: FIXTURE_NOT_PRODUCTION: odds embedded in fixture file are static test data. Must never be treated as real market odds.
source_candidate_matrix.notes: Fixture file includes sample odds for adapter schema testing only.

MLB StatsAPI provides final score + game status via /api/v1/game/{gamePk}/linescore. Official source. No key required. Same ToS considerations as schedule. home_win can be derived from final scores. Handles postponed/cancelled via game_status field.

source_candidate_matrix.rejection_reason: Manual process only; acceptable as emergency fallback
source_candidate_matrix.notes: Human operator enters final scores after games complete.

source_candidate_matrix.rejection_reason: Historical only — cannot provide today-mode results
source_candidate_matrix.notes: data/mlb_2025/derived/mlb_2025_per_game_predictions_phase56_sp_bullpen_context_v1.jsonl Contains home_win for 2025 season replay. Used for replay mode pipeline validation only.

validation_rules: game_date must be ISO YYYY-MM-DD format
home_team and away_team must be non-empty strings
game_status must be one of: scheduled, live, final, postponed, cancelled, suspended
scheduled_start_time must be ISO 8601 or None
schedule_source_contract.unavailable_behavior: If source is unavailable: set source_unavailable_flag=True, do not generate advisory, trigger fallback to DATA_LIMITED
schedule_source_contract.fallback_behavior: Fallback order: live current source → manual CSV import → fixture (tests/dry-run only) → DATA_LIMITED

validation_rules: home_moneyline_odds must be American odds integer (e.g. -140, +120)
away_moneyline_odds must be American odds integer
runline_spread if present must be float (typically ±1.5)
odds_source_contract.unavailable_behavior: If odds unavailable: set market_home_prob_no_vig=None, advisory must output PASS (no_model_prediction mode). Do not invent or estimate odds.
odds_source_contract.fallback_behavior: Fallback: live odds API → manual CSV import → no odds (PASS advisory only) → DATA_LIMITED

normalization_contract.raw_odds_available: bool — True if home+away moneyline present
normalization_contract.derived_probability_flag: bool — True if prob was derived (not from direct prob source)
normalization_contract.bookmaker_source: str | None — name/id of bookmaker if available
normalization_contract.closing_line_available: bool — True if closing-line odds present
normalization_contract.odds_timestamp: str | None — ISO 8601 timestamp of the odds snapshot

validation_rules: game_status must be one of: final, postponed, cancelled, suspended
home_win must be 0 or 1 for final games; None for postponed/cancelled
final_home_score and final_away_score must be non-negative integers for final games
Postponed games: home_win=None, no ledger result update
Cancelled games: home_win=None, mark ledger entry as CANCELLED
Suspended games: treat as PENDING until resumed final posted
result_source_contract.unavailable_behavior: If result unavailable: ledger entries remain PENDING_REVIEW. Do not fabricate results. Do not mark as WON/LOST without confirmed data.
result_source_contract.fallback_behavior: Fallback: live result API → manual CSV import → manual override (human-entered) → remain PENDING

american_odds_to_implied_prob.description: Converts American odds to raw implied probability. Positive (underdog): 100/(odds+100). Negative (favorite): |odds|/(|odds|+100).

normalize_two_way_no_vig.signature: normalize_two_way_no_vig(home_ml: float, away_ml: float) -> tuple[float, float]
normalize_two_way_no_vig.description: Removes bookmaker vig from two-way market. Divides each raw implied prob by total overround. Returns (no_vig_home_prob, no_vig_away_prob).

output_fields.raw_odds_available: bool — True if home + away moneyline American odds present
output_fields.derived_probability_flag: bool — True if probability was derived (not raw)
output_fields.bookmaker_source: str | None — bookmaker name/id if available
output_fields.closing_line_available: bool — True if closing-line snapshot present
output_fields.odds_timestamp: str | None — ISO 8601 timestamp of odds snapshot
output_fields.market_away_prob_no_vig: float — no-vig away win probability (= 1 - home)

today_mode_fallback_priority.condition: source reachable, schema valid, freshness OK
live source unavailable; human operator provides CSV
today_mode_fallback_priority.action: use for advisory + ledger; flag as manual_import=True

today_mode_fallback_priority.condition: ONLY if explicitly allowed (dry-run / schema-test / demo); NEVER for production
today_mode_fallback_priority.action: use for schema validation and dry-run only; fixture_not_production=True

today_mode_fallback_priority.condition: historical data only; date must be in historical range
today_mode_fallback_priority.action: use for replay mode advisory; flag as today_schedule_unavailable=True
do not generate advisory; return gate=MLB_SCHEDULER_DATA_LIMITED

replay_mode_fallback_priority.action: full replay: advisory + ledger + result review

forbidden_uses: production advisory (real advisory treated as live)
override of live source in production pipeline
fixture_governance_rules.enforcement: FIXTURE_NOT_PRODUCTION=True must be set on all fixture-sourced responses. Scheduler gate must not reach MLB_DAILY_SCHEDULER_READY when fixture source is active.

integration_plan.goal: Implement a live schedule source adapter that fetches today's MLB schedule from MLB StatsAPI (or manual CSV fallback). Validates schema contract. No odds dependency.
acceptance_criteria: Adapter returns list of schedule rows matching MLBScheduleSourceContract
All required fields present or explicit unavailable flags set
Source health gate evaluates correctly (OK / STALE / UNAVAILABLE)
Fixture source returns FIXTURE_NOT_PRODUCTION flag
Postponed/cancelled games handled without exception
All 6 new tests pass
No regression in existing 1086+ tests
integration_plan.rollback_plan: Revert orchestrator/mlb_schedule_source_adapter.py to previous version or delete if newly created. Fixture source remains available for testing. mlb_daily_scheduler.py already handles fixture fallback.
integration_plan.governance_guard: PRODUCTION_MODIFIED=False throughout. Fixture source must not bypass production pipeline. Any live API fetch must be read-only.

integration_plan.goal: Implement an odds source adapter that normalizes moneyline/runline/total from a verified API (e.g. The Odds API). Applies american_odds_to_implied_prob + normalize_two_way_no_vig. Produces source health report per MLBOddsSourceContract.
acceptance_criteria: Adapter normalizes moneyline to no-vig probability using existing functions
market_home_prob_no_vig in (0.0, 1.0) for all valid inputs
Missing runline/total fields handled without exception
Source health gate triggers correctly on >50% missing moneyline
No stake_sizing field in any output
All 8 new tests pass
No regression in existing tests
integration_plan.rollback_plan: Delete orchestrator/mlb_odds_source_adapter.py if newly created. Advisory falls back to market_home_prob_no_vig=None → PASS advisory.
integration_plan.governance_guard: No stake sizing. No closing line value calculation. odds_normalization_contract_v1 enforced. API key must be stored in .env — never hardcoded. Scraping (ACTION_NETWORK) is blocked — must not be implemented.

integration_plan.phase_name: Result Source Adapter + Auto Post-game Review
integration_plan.goal: Implement a result source adapter that fetches final scores from MLB StatsAPI and triggers automatic post-game ledger review. Handles postponed/cancelled/suspended per MLBResultSourceContract. Writes reviewed snapshot.
acceptance_criteria: Adapter returns final scores matching MLBResultSourceContract
home_win correctly derived from final scores
Postponed games: home_win=None, ledger entries remain PENDING
Cancelled games: ledger entries marked CANCELLED
Auto post-game review triggers for FINAL games
All 8 new tests pass
No regression in existing tests
integration_plan.rollback_plan: Delete orchestrator/mlb_result_source_adapter.py if newly created. Scheduler falls back to manual result ingestion path. Ledger entries remain PENDING — no data loss.
integration_plan.governance_guard: No result fabrication. no_auto_result_fabrication=True enforced. human_review_required for suspended/cancelled games. LEDGER_OVERWRITE_BLOCKED=True must remain throughout.

integration_plan.phase_name: Daily Scheduler Integration + API Status + Source Freshness Dashboard
integration_plan.goal: Integrate live schedule/odds/result adapters into mlb_daily_scheduler.py. Add API status endpoint for source freshness. Build source health dashboard (JSON + markdown). Full pipeline: live schedule → live odds → advisory → ledger → live result → post-game review → failure notes → manifest.
acceptance_criteria: Scheduler gate reaches MLB_DAILY_SCHEDULER_READY with live sources
API status endpoint returns source_health per source type
Source freshness dashboard JSON + markdown generated
Fallback to DATA_LIMITED when all live sources unavailable
Completion marker MLB_DAILY_SCHEDULER_API_MVP_VERIFIED preserved
All 6 new tests pass
No regression in existing tests
integration_plan.rollback_plan: Revert orchestrator/mlb_daily_scheduler.py to current version (scheduler v1). Fixture-based and replay-based pipelines remain operational. Gate reverts to MLB_SCHEDULER_DATA_LIMITED / MLB_SCHEDULER_API_MVP_READY.
integration_plan.governance_guard: NO_REAL_BET=True throughout. PRODUCTION_MODIFIED=False throughout. No stake sizing in any new API endpoint. Live source freshness checks must not bypass DATA_LIMITED gate. MLB_LIVE_SOURCE_PLAN_VERIFIED must be in Phase Live-4 report.

gate_rationale: Contracts and plan complete; 1 recommended odds source(s) require human API verification: The Odds API (the-odds-api.com)
